name: Splat
description: Ink flicked at the page from a loaded brush — every splat throws its droplets in a new direction per redraw.

code.style: --rule: ( /* the splat and its droplets share one emitted ink */ --inkx: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: @rand(28%, 52%); left: @rand(16%, 36%); top: @rand(16%, 36%); border-radius: @rand(34%, 62%) @rand(38%, 66%) @rand(34%, 62%) @rand(38%, 66%); background: @var(--inkx); transform: rotate(@rand(360deg)) scale(@rand(0.9, 1.15), @rand(0.85, 1.1)); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: @rand(6%, 10%); left: 46%; top: 46%; border-radius: 50%; background: @var(--inkx); box-shadow: calc(@r(-200, 200) * 1px / @Y) calc(@r(-200, 200) * 1px / @Y) @var(--inkx), calc(@r(-240, 240) * 1px / @Y) calc(@r(-240, 240) * 1px / @Y) 0 calc(-3px / @Y) @var(--inkx); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
